verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Dont let the hurt, the pain, The harder things numb my life, I want to feel You more It's just easy to loose sensitivity Tenderness when my mind is out poured My heart is open wide I'm burning inside

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh fill me Lord Take all these bitterness And shut the door As I empty out All these hurt Cleanse me, heart restored Fill me Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So now that You were within You can begin to heal my soul Comfort only comes with You Please use my life a sacrifice To show Your love so merciful like You My heart's open wide I'm burning inside

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Fill my cup Lord I lift it up Lord Come and quench This thirsting of my soul
